revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 1024x512px pixel-art animated sprite sheet on a solid #FF00FF chroma-key background, no gradients. Sheet layout is exactly 4 columns x 2 rows, each frame exactly 256x256px, eight frames total. No visible grid lines, no cell borders, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark.

Use the attached reference image as the exact character identity and style reference. Repose the same character only; do not redesign. Match the reference proportions, same head-to-body ratio, same slim-but-sturdy body width, same total standing height, same pixel density, same palette, same dark one-pixel outline style, same top-left lighting, same bright cheerful mythical-Japan action RPG look.

Character: hero Mito, androgynous 15-year-old wanderer, top-down 3/4 view facing DOWN toward viewer with face visible. Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament, calm amber eyes. White tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads. At the left hip hangs a sheathed short ritual sword in a WHITE scabbard wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers, clearly a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

STRICT PROPORTIONS: all eight frames show the exact same character at the exact same scale. Head size, head-to-body ratio, body width, limb thickness, and standing body height must match across all frames. Character is large in each 256x256 cell, filling most of the cell height while leaving clear magenta margin on all sides. Feet stay on the same ground line in every cell. Feet are close together, only about shoulder-width apart, legs nearly vertical. Relaxed natural stance, not a wide horse stance, not combat-braced. Sword remains sheathed at the hip.

Motion: eight-frame subtle BREATHING IDLE LOOP, one direction only, facing down. Arrange frames left-to-right on the top row as frames 1-4, then left-to-right on the bottom row as frames 5-8.
Frame 1: neutral relaxed stance, eyes open.
Frame 2: slow inhale, chest and shoulders rise 1-2 pixels, feet unchanged.
Frame 3: inhale peak, head lifts 1 pixel, shoulders slightly highest, feet unchanged.
Frame 4: breath held, haori hem, vermilion cord tassels, and tiny white paper streamers drift subtly, feet unchanged.
Frame 5: exhale begins, shoulders settle slightly, feet unchanged.
Frame 6: lowest relaxed point, body 1-2 pixels lower than neutral, feet unchanged, same total scale.
Frame 7: calm blink, eyes closed while body returns toward neutral, feet unchanged.
Frame 8: eyes open, back to neutral stance matching frame 1 for seamless loop.

Silhouette changes are small and smooth; this is a quiet idle, not an action. Haori hem, tassels, and paper streamers sway subtly. Every drawn pixel must belong to the single character inside its own cell. No body part, sword piece, cord, tassel, streamer, or stray fragment may cross a cell boundary or float detached. No isolated pixel islands, no seam slivers, no dust specks, no leftover effect residue. Solid #FF00FF fills all empty space.

Avoid all protected or recognizable likenesses, no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature, no letter emblems, no UI.
